reviews.review_msg: If you are looking for a structured class, don't take it with him. I learned some things about life, but a lot of the class was a waste of time. I don't think I would take a class with him.. one was enough. Get yourself a good group that is keen and you will have a good experience. I wish I took the class with Gervase.
Totally awesome Professor, if you really want to learn something other than hitting powerpoint slides and trying to get an easy A, this is your guy.  Learned more in this class than any other course

Was a little skeptical about this class since he did not provide clear instructions, but that was the whole point! This is not your typical memorizing and regurgitating the textbook class because this class teaches you to become more aware of your emotions and how to appropriately communicate those emotions. highly recommended!
The prof is cool, the lecture is interesting but he is not very clear about the projects.
Prof lectures are useless. Just read the book.

Talks about random stuff for the entire time... talks on the phone during entire tutorial... tells you what chapters are on the midterm one week before its due .. self teach yourself everything basically
Best teacher ever. His lectures are so informative that he doesn't even need to open the PowerPoint. His lectures about life are much more important than the course content.

Absolutely amazing prof! Passionate and interesting to listen to. Both "quizzes" and assignments are easy. No midterm or final, just 3 MC quizzes. No need to attend lecture (although they are super interesting), everything on quizzes is from textbook and written assignment is your choice. Hardest part is the group project.

by far the worst prof in sfu. opens a power point slide, and out of ~40 slides he stays on the first slide which has the topic of the lecture for half the class. even though we pointed out that we'd like him to relate more to the textbook, he still talks about useless random stuff that is very hard to relate to the textbook. avoid at all cost

Lectures are so boring, prof talks way too much about useless stuff and doesn't even go over the course material. instructions for assignments and group projects are so vague, everyone didn't know what to do. Easy class but pretty much a gamble with your grades if you get stuck with lazy people for group project.
Excellent course based on excellent book of Gervase R. Bushe taught by an excellent professor: fun, lively and demanding. I have found this course extremely useful and eyes opening. Bravo!

The most useless but easiest Business class @ sfu. TA taught most of the class. Grading was odd,  high averages, easy "quizzes", no need to attend classes b/c tests based solely on text, cramming day of exam will give you an A easily. Don't bother going to some tut, esp if you live far. P.S. There are no bonus marks, don't do assessments. Hoax.
Boriest & Useless busines class ever. Useless lecture, striaght from the textbook. Quiz was striaght from the book too!

This course was super easy. Lecture notes useless, Study straight from the textbook, exams done from the textbook, use textbook multiple choice pratice. Lots of bonus work, final worth 8%, make sure to get above class average on all projects or you'll end up with a c. class average was around 90%.

Fun class, entertaining professor, but REALLY annoying assessments, and you never knew if he was actually going to show up for class. Graded on a curve, so you have to do extra well on tests in order to get a good mark because they are so easy.

The one and only reason you should take this course with this prof is to have a super easy final, which is pretty good if you have many.However, the marking scheme is very unfair, the professor does not even come to his lectures (with no explanations as to why) and group work sucks when your randomly picked group is full of lazy people.grade=random

Material and lectures were interesting and not difficult to understand, but i found that (with the way marks were distributed) I got a terrible grade. It lowered my GPA quite a bit, I was surprised. Group work counted for far too much I think.

It seems like an easy class.. its sorta common sense and psychology combine together. His lectures are useless. No one listens to him. This class is basically self learned and self read. He gives alot of bonus marks and makes u do a bunch of these assessments. Quiz and finals arent worth that much but presentation have to do well!
Good class / prof.

No fun at all, he teaches nothing in the class,(I guess there is nothing to teach about,I just hate this course,the whole orgnization behavior is nonsense,nohting pratical!!)so much time spend on assessment and team meetings(at least three times effert to put in then other courses) but so little you will receive.Everyone is disappointed.

waste of time doing all those assessments, bad teaching, waste of time going to class, final is just like the 3 quizzes=8% each, average is too high, worst instructor, seems like an easy class but its not

Marking scheme is horrible, as are TAs (well, at least one). Therefore it's a lottery with your grade. Another thing is with the surveys - the prof really annoys everyone with them. He is doing some research, but gee, with the way the students answer these, the only valid research is about pseudo-random number generation.

It's like this, you only need your textbook for 4 small 10% quizzes. The rest of the marking is based on luck, so if you feel lucky, take this course with Coetzer. And he will make you fill out probably 20 hours with of assessments over the course. Attending lectures and getting a high grade are negatively correlated in my opinion. Take it w/Zatsik
its seems like an easy course and all but the average is way too high.  His lectures are okay, but the assessments get repetitive

A nice guy that likes to hear himself talk. Don't go to lecture, there is no point as he doesn't test you on anything but the text. Make the class average way too high so when you think your doing well you most likely arn't doing super great. 'Nice I got 92% on my paper! Oh crap the average is 90%'

I got an A+ and didn't go to a single lecture. Study the text book and do a good job in the group work and you'll cruise on easy street. By the way....too many damn surveys I just started answering randomly after the first few, were a waste of time for me and the Prof.
Note to prof: if you give us 8 million survey questions we're not going to fill them out accurately....u're wasting ure time. Random marking, useless lectures
No Comments
fun guy but dont expect him to be helpful, hes lazy and wont do as he says

lectures have nothing to do with tests but he makes them interesting and understandable.. although u could get a great mark in this class without going to a single lecture his lectures provide great insight about life
Very dynamic and animated; he marks too easy though.  The class averages were really high so you didn't do as well as you really should have.
No Comments
No Comments
